experiment_pass_criteria: PASS iff (i) verdict continuum at beta in {0,1,2}, (ii) verdict crystal at beta=6, (iii) verdict not continuum at beta=3 and beta=4. Predictions are sharper than the pass criteria and are scored separately.

provenance.recon_basis: exploratory dual-start sweep (scratchpad p9), N=100 eps=0.12: continuum profile through beta=2, hysteretic crystallization at beta>=3, ideal bipartite reached at beta=6 X-start (S=-118.4 vs theory -120)
provenance.note: Gates and predictions frozen BEFORE the confirmatory multi-seed run (seeds 100-104 disjoint from all calibration/recon seeds). MM dimension deliberately excluded from gates: bipartite crystals also sit at MM ~ 2 (E1/E2 lesson); discriminating observables are n0 deviation, n1+n2 collapse, and height. Do not edit after freezing.
